title: Intrepid (Imperial I-class)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1|title2=''Imperial I''-class}} {{IndividualShip |image=[[File:Intrepid-XW.png]] |name=''Intrepid'' |designer= |manufacturer=[[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] |line=[[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] |model=[[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]]{{CSWECite|II|109|''Intrepid'' (4)}} |type=Star Destroyer |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length=1,600 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine= |hyperdrive= |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament= |complement=[[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] |bays= |escapepods= |crew= |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |role= |commission= |destroyed=[[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]] |retired= |battles= *[[Rescue from Stars' End]] *[[Ambush of the Phoenix|Ambush of the ''Phoenix'']] *[[Attack on the Phoenix|Attack on the ''Phoenix'']] *[[Battle of the Circarpous system (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of the Circarpous system]] |affiliation=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |navy=[[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] |fleet= |owners= |captains= |crewmembers= |registry= |aliases= }} '''''Intrepid''''' was an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] that served with the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Starfleet]] during the early years of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was the first [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] to be destroyed in a direct assault by forces of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. ==History== During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], ''Intrepid'' was tasked with guarding the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] detention center at [[Mytus VII/Legends|Mytus VII]]. After some Rebel pilots, including [[Samuel Raider]] and [[Toalagar]], escaped aboard the [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] ''[[Genue]]'', the ''Intrepid'' was sent to oversee their recapture near [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. However, a Rebel rescue mission conducted by the [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]] ''[[Drago]]'' was able to retrieve the escapees while [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] and [[Cardacs]] in [[R-22 Spearhead starfighter|R-22 Spearheads]] held off [[TIE series/Legends|starfighters]] launched from the ''Intrepid''. Still near Kashyyyk, the ''Intrepid'' was present when the Rebels mounted a [[Rescue of enslaved Wookiees|rescue]] of [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] slaves being transferred by the freighter [[Toral (BFF-1 bulk freighter)|''Toral'']] to work on the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]]. The Rebels overcame the [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]] defending the freighter and boarded it to rescue the Wookiees. Although the ''Intrepid'' launched fighters to stop them, they were held off by Raider and Farlander until the rescue was complete. Later, some [[communications satellite]]s were stolen from the Imperial base on [[Orron III]] and were being taken off-planet by the freighter [[Phoenix (BFF-1 bulk freighter)|''Phoenix'']]. The ''Intrepid'' responded but, by the time it arrived, the freighter had been [[Ambush of the Phoenix|captured]] by Rebel forces and had gone to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. The ''Intrepid'' launched fighters but Farlander, flying the single Rebel [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing]] in the area, fought them off and launched a [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedo]] at the ''Intrepid'' in spite before leaving. The next week the ''Intrepid'' [[Attack on the Phoenix|attempted]] to destroy the ''Phoenix'' while it awaited the arrival of the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] ''[[Maximus]]''. The Imperial attack was interrupted by Keyan Farlander in an R-22 Spearhead who held off the Imperial fighters until the ''Maximus'' arrived. Shortly after the ''Maximus's'' arrival, the ''Intrepid'' fled leading the Rebels to conclude that it was suffering from a shortage of pilots or starfighters. ===Destruction of the ''Intrepid''=== {{Quote|I'm a little surprised you didn't take out that whole Star Destroyer yourself.''"
"''Yessir [sic], I just wanted to let the other guys have some fun, too.|Lagrane debriefs Keyan Farlander after the final attack on the ''Intrepid''|''[[X-Wing: The Official Strategy Guide]]''}} [[File:Intrepid.jpg|thumb|left|307x307px|[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces attempt to repel [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] fighters during ''Intrepid's'' final battle.|alt=]]The ''Intrepid's'' [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] was later damaged in an accidental collision with an [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]], leaving the ship stranded in the [[Circarpous system/Legends|Circarpous system]]. The ''Intrepid'' was the last 'witness' of the transmission of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]] plans to Rebel hands and the Alliance saw an opportunity. Keyan Farlander flew an [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]], escorted by two R-22 Spearheads, in a raid against freighters from ''[[Kiam]]'' group which were delivering parts to repair the hyperdrive. Despite the ''Intrepid'' launching TIEs against the attacking Rebels, the freighters with the hyperdrive parts were destroyed before they were able to make the delivery. With the ''Intrepid'' still stranded and low on fighters, the Empire sent three [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] from [[Viper (corvette group)|''Viper'']] group and several [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]] to reinforce it until repairs could be made. The Rebels decided to destroy the reinforcements before they could get close to the ''Intrepid''. Farlander led a group of Y-wings, escorted by [[Ernek Marskan]] in an X-wing, in the mission. Despite sending [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]] to assist the incoming ships, the ''Intrepid'' could do little but watch as its reinforcements were destroyed by the Rebels. The ''Intrepid'' was now laid defenseless, apart from the last few remaining TIE pilots. The Alliance decided that the time for a major attack had come. Two X-wings from [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]], flown by Keyan Farlander and [[Sunnar Jan-lo]], were tasked with shooting ''Intrepid''{{'s}} [[ISD-72x deflector shield generator dome|ISD-72x shield generator domes]] ahead of a heavy torpedo bombardment from [[Blue Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Blue Squadron's]] Y-wings. Two R-22s from [[Gold Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Gold Squadron]] would engage the TIE defenses and protect the other Rebel craft. [[Samuel Raider]] and Ernek Marskan were among the Rebel pilots who participated in the battle. Though the Rebels lost some of their fighters, the bombardment proved too much and the ''Intrepid'' was eventually destroyed, becoming the first Star Destroyer to be blown by a Rebel frontal assault. A patrol of Assault Gunboats arrived too late to save the ''Intrepid'' and the Rebels escaped into hyperspace. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] {{1st}} ==Sources== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Intrepid (Imperial I-class)}} *''[[X-Wing: The Official Strategy Guide]]'' *''[[X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]'' *{{Topps|set=1995 Topps Star Wars Galaxy Series 3|cardname=The Farlander Papers (L9)|link=https://www.tcdb.com/ViewCard.cfm/sid/82502/cid/6590888?PageIndex=1}} *''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Imperial I-class Star Destroyers]] [[Category:Starships of the Galactic Empire]]
